nodes.label: Unit tests for Worker Pool agent job processing, Database Manager, and Extractio
Test delegates to _process_agent_job for PCA agent.
Test delegates to _process_agent_job for PA agent.
Test delegates to _process_agent_job for KYC agent.
Test successfully processes KYC agent job (start_kyc_agent_container).
Test validates required fields (job_id, extraction_id, agent_type).
Test that K8s job is cleaned up if DB update fails after successful container cr
Test that _process_agent_job skips when next_run_at is in the future.
Test that _process_agent_job handles AttributeError when container method doesn'
Test that _process_agent_job skips when job status is already IN_PROGRESS or PEN
Test that _process_agent_job sets next_run_at on rate limit error.
Test that _prepare_agent_item handles document retrieval failure gracefully.
Test that _prepare_agent_item handles when extraction.meta is None or not a dict
Test maps queue data to agent_item for PCA.
Test maps queue data to agent_item for PA.
Test includes all metadata fields (dealName, partyName, etc.).
Test maps queue data to agent_item for KYC (SOURCE_FILE_IDS, REFERENCE_FILE_IDS)
Test _prepare_agent_item with real get_agent_config('pa_agent') validates full c
Test _prepare_agent_item with real get_agent_config('kyc_agent') validates full
Tests for DatabaseManager Extraction model detection fix.
Test correctly identifies Extraction by extraction_id.
Test no warning when querying Extraction by extraction_id.
Test correctly identifies Document by document_id (requires version).
Test raises ValueError when version not provided for Document.
Test correctly identifies Job by job_id.
Test get_as_dict correctly identifies Document (requires version).
Tests for ExtractionService agent container methods.

Test sets META_DATA for PA agent.
